chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 34 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Priority case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on MA 1209/2023 3.For hearing of main case. 4.For hearing of MA 266/2023 5.For orders on MA 1210/2023 07-08-2023 Mr. Mohsin Kadir Shahwani, Advocate for applicants. Mr. M.M. Aqil Awan, Advocate for private respondent No.5. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State a/w Munir Ahmed, SHO, P.S, Bhiria City. ***** After hearing this application, filed against impugned order dated 22.12.2022, seeking directions to official respondents i.e. police for registration of FIR; restriction against excess committed by them in respect of immovable properties regarding which civil litigation is pending between applicants and respondent No.5 before the relevant Courts; and giving directions to police concerned to act strictly in accordance with law and not to interfere, is disposed of in the terms whereby police officers are directed to strictly act in accordance with law and not to interfere in the private affairs of the parties until and unless some cognizable offence is made out and it is reported to them. Learned counsel for private respondent states that applicants have already registered FIR No.19 of 2023 under Sections 447, 504, 506/2 PPC at P.S, Bhiria City, regarding which trial is pending. Be that as it may, as stated above, this application along with listed applications is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
